2603.28716.title: Dynamic Dual-Granularity Skill Bank for Agentic RL
2603.28716.paper_summary: Agentic reinforcement learning (RL) can benefit substantially from reusable experience, yet existing skill-based methods mainly extract trajectory-level guidance and often lack principled mechanisms for maintaining an evolving skill memory. We propose D2Skill, a dynamic dual-granularity skill bank for agentic RL that organizes reusable experience into task skills for high-level guidance and step skills for fine-grained decision support and error correction. D2Skill jointly trains the policy and skill bank through paired baseline and skill-injected rollouts under the same policy, using their performance gap to derive hindsight utility signals for both skill updating and policy optimization. Built entirely from training-time experience, the skill bank is continuously expanded through reflection and maintained with utility-aware retrieval and pruning. Experiments on ALFWorld and WebShop with Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct and Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 show that D2Skill consistently improves success rates over skill-free baselines by 10-20 points. Further ablations and analyses show that both dual-granularity skill modeling and dynamic skill maintenance are critical to these gains, while the learned skills exhibit higher utility, transfer across evaluation settings, and introduce only modest training overhead.
2603.28716.paper_summary_zh: 代理強化學習（RL）可以從可重用的經驗中獲得實質性的好處，但現有的基於技能的方法主要提取軌跡級別的指導，並且通常缺乏維護不斷發展的技能記憶的原則性機制。我們提出了 D2Skill，一個動態雙粒度技能庫，旨在為代理強化學習組織可重用的經驗，將其劃分為高層次指導的任務技能和用於細粒度決策支持及錯誤修正的步驟技能。D2Skill 通過在相同策略下的配對基線和技能注入的回合共同訓練策略和技能庫，利用它們的性能差距來推導回顧效用信號，以進行技能更新和策略優化。該技能庫完全基於訓練時的經驗，不斷通過反思擴展，並通過考慮效用的檢索和修剪進行維護。在 ALFWorld 和 WebShop 上進行的實驗，使用 Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct 和 Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 顯示，D2Skill 一直能將成功率提高 10-20 個點，相較於無技能的基線。進一步的消融和分析顯示，雙粒度技能建模和動態技能維護對這些增益至關重要，而所學的技能則表現出更高的效用，能夠在評估設置之間轉移，並且只引入適度的訓練開銷。
2603.28716.author: Songjun Tu et.al.
2603.28716.authors: Songjun Tu, Chengdong Xu, Qichao Zhang, Yaocheng Zhang, Xiangyuan Lan, Linjing Li, Dongbin Zhao
